agentsQaChecklist: Agent cards state no execution authority
Agent cards state no Provider Call, no filesystem, and no capability approval
No card implies active agent execution
settingsQaChecklist: Settings are governance config, not generic forms
Settings disclose no productive settings are persisted
Settings disclose no provider key is stored
Settings do not enable capabilities or runtime behavior
activityQaChecklist: Activity Feed is mission-readable, not raw logs
Feed rows show time, actor, event, summary, evidence, commit, and status
Blocked feed states explain why, missing, evidence, action, and disabled surfaces
Feed does not become productive source-of-truth
acceptanceCriteria: Settings Governance Visual System artifact exists
Mission Activity Feed Visual System artifact exists
Static previews contain no outside scripts, remote dependencies, network activity, or instrumentation
